Class NotificationRecord

java.lang.Object
shelter.service.model.NotificationRecord
public class NotificationRecord extends Object
Represents a record of a notification that was dispatched by a staff member. Captures who sent the notification, what action triggered it, the target identifier, and when it occurred.

  • Constructor Summary

  • Constructor Details

    • NotificationRecord

      public NotificationRecord(Staff staff, String action, String targetId, LocalDateTime timestamp)
      Constructs a NotificationRecord with the given staff, action, target identifier, and timestamp. All fields are immutable once set to preserve the integrity of the notification history. No argument may be null; action and targetId must not be blank.
      Parameters:
      staff - the staff member who dispatched the notification; must not be null
      action - a short description of the action that triggered the notification; must not be null or blank
      targetId - the identifier of the target object (e.g. request ID); must not be null or blank
      timestamp - the date and time the notification was sent; must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any argument is null or action/targetId is blank

    • NotificationRecord

      public NotificationRecord(NotificationRecord other)
      Copy constructor that creates a new NotificationRecord with all field values copied from other. The copy preserves the same staff, action, target ID, and timestamp.
      Parameters:
      other - the NotificationRecord instance to copy; must not be null

  • Method Details

    • getStaff

      public Staff getStaff()
      Returns the staff member who dispatched this notification. Never null for a validly constructed record.
      Returns:
      the staff member

    • getAction

      public String getAction()
      Returns the action description that triggered this notification. Never null or blank for a validly constructed record.
      Returns:
      the action string

    • getTargetId

      public String getTargetId()
      Returns the identifier of the target object this notification relates to. Never null or blank for a validly constructed record.
      Returns:
      the target identifier

    • getTimestamp

      public LocalDateTime getTimestamp()
      Returns the timestamp of when this notification was dispatched. Never null for a validly constructed record.
      Returns:
      the timestamp

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object o)
      Returns true if the given object is a NotificationRecord with equal staff, action, target ID, and timestamp. Equality is value-based since notification records have no unique ID.
      Overrides:
      equals in class Object
      Parameters:
      o - the object to compare
      Returns:
      true if all fields are equal

    • hashCode

      public int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code based on all fields. Consistent with equals(Object).
      Overrides:
      hashCode in class Object
      Returns:
      the hash code

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this notification record including staff, action, target, and timestamp.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      a human-readable description of this notification record
